summary: Behavior depends on mutable global flag, creating hidden coupling and rollout risk.

findings.evidence: InputNormalizer behavior depends on RuntimeFlags singleton set by AdminApi side effects.
findings.minimal_fix: Inject strict-mode policy as explicit dependency instead of reading global mutable state.
findings.verification: Add unit tests for normalizer with strict mode on/off through dependency injection.

findings.evidence: One flag toggle can affect multiple call sites unpredictably at runtime.
findings.minimal_fix: Scope flag changes to request/session context and avoid process-wide mutation.
findings.verification: Run integration tests for parallel requests and assert behavior isolation.

findings.evidence: Tests become order-dependent when shared global state is not reset reliably.
findings.minimal_fix: Remove global dependency and provide explicit test setup values per test case.
findings.verification: Execute test suite with random order and confirm deterministic results.
